_about: Tracks the 100 reimagined-transcript shorts. Pipeline per video: edge-tts(Andrew) narration -> faster-whisper word timings -> bespoke Remotion composition (SkyBlue quality) -> render -> punchy-recut (scene-matched SFX) -> loudnorm -14 LUFS -> FINAL_SHORTS/reimagined. Status: pending | done | skip.

plans_ready: ClipPilot/remotion_explainer/plans/ — 014-040 (27 plans written by plan-reimagined-shorts workflow, draft→punch-up)
sfx_policy: VARY SFX per video, topic-matched. cosmic_boom lives at assets/sound_effects/derived/cosmic_boom.wav (NOT impacts/). Bake scene-matched hero SFX into the Remotion comp via <Sequence from={frame}><Audio/></Sequence>; vary recut --cut-sfx rotation per topic.
caption_policy: <Captions> at ROOT only (never inside a <Sequence> — useCurrentFrame rebases). New comps import words.json directly (import w from './<slug>_words.json') instead of hand-transcribing WRAW.
milestone: 22/100 done. Batch #011-031 all published, varied SFX, captions synced, audio -16..-18dB.
next: 032_shocking-a-heart-to-life (plan: plans/defib.json, title 'Shocking A Heart To Life')
